title: Yeshua (feat. Kim Walker-Smith)
html: [Intro] G A G A Bm F#m Bm F#m Bm F#m G A Bm Yeshu....a, Yeshu...uuu...a Bm F#m He is coming on the clouds of heaven G A Bm To bring us to the new Jerusalem Bm F#m Until then we patiently await Him G A Bm Our Lord, our savior and our friend Bm F#m G A Bm Yeshu.....a, Yeshu...uuu...a [Solo] Em Bm F#m C#m Em G A G A G A Bm F#m Vem saltando sobre os montes G A Bm Do meu Brasil Bm F#m Sou tua igreja apaixonada G A Bm Te esperando para dançar
